title: Were "Divine" Experiences Actually Just Alien Abductions?
summary: Jesse Michels discusses Diana Pasulka's book 'American Cosmic' and the theory that historical divine contact experiences, such as St. Francis of Assisi's stigmata, may have actually been UFO encounters involving electromagnetic radiation effects.

key_claims.claim: St. Francis of Assisi's stigmata experience involved documented phenomena including sound and fury, atmospheric sparks, a spinning disc, and telepathic communication, followed by wounds from rays of light
Diana Pasulka speculates that St. Francis's hand wounds interpreted as stigmata may have been radiation damage from a UFO experience
UFO craft emit electromagnetic radiation that can cause effects similar to sunburn through blue-shifted visible light in the ultraviolet spectrum
